title: F - Strip Remaster
userDescription: Strips remaster from track titles and album titles. With special parameters.

title: F - Year
userDescription: Formats the year field to display XXXX not XXXX-XX-XX.

title: F - Trim Whitespace
userDescription: Trims whitespace from before and after text in any tag field.

title: F - Style to Genre
userDescription: Moves the contents of style field to genre, because discogs tagging source puts genres as style, so this fixes that.

title: F - Artist to Album Artist
userDescription: Appends artist to album artist field, because my saving script uses the album artist field to name the path when saving to disk.

children.title: G - Death/Thrash; Death Metal; Thrash Metal
